welcome.subtitle: You're among our founding members. Here's what to expect.

community.title: Matches grow with our community
community.body: We're growing carefully — quality over quantity. Your match feed will refresh daily as more verified profiles join.

privacy.title: Privacy by default
privacy.body: Your photos and contact details stay private until both sides show genuine interest. Family members can co-review without exposure.

notifications.title: Get notified instantly
notifications.body: When new compatible profiles join, we will notify you. Add your horoscope to unlock Guna Milan compatibility scoring.
